BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.aromaPrinciple: [sine][green]Let’s see what new stories or… songs I can gather here?[/green][/sine]
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.banter.alive.endTurn: Hey friend, I’m in a hurry for a drink.
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.cardsModifierDescrip: Bard cards now appear in rewards and shops.
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.description:
A wandering bard from beyond the Spire.
Always ready for a song, a tale, and a drink.
Knows a bit of magic through their instrument.
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.eventDeathPrevention: No—my story shall not end here……
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.goldMonologue: [sine]Oh yeah, looks like we can grab another round![/sine]
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.title: The Bard
BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.unlockText: Play a game to unlock this character.
